customers_say: Customers find the digital lock to be a good upgrade from regular door locks, with excellent installation and reliable functionality. They appreciate its security features, including multiple unlocking options, and consider it easy to use, with one customer noting it's convenient for different family members. The service receives positive feedback, and customers find it feature-rich. While opinions on value for money are mixed, with some finding it overpriced.

reviews.author: ilias ali
reviews.title: Nice lock
reviews.body: Nice product.... also technician Rabin is very helpful

reviews.author: Nitin G.
reviews.title: Good Product
reviews.body: Good Product. and service is good.

reviews.author: PSS
reviews.title: Un-trained technicians basically know only carpentry work only.
reviews.body: Technician could not configure WIfi with the digital lock。 He is not experienced。 also does not have time to configure He put the blame on internet provider and went off。 For such a expensive lock, the technicians should be properly trained not only carpentry work but also ensures proper software and complete configuration. Very disappointing. Options are available for Rs 10K onwards, but preferred Godrej for their service, and reputation。

reviews.author: Anusha murari
reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.body: Installation was down Mr Ravindra chary shown every thing and easily to acess explained clerely

reviews.author: Garima
reviews.title: Please Dont Buy Godrej Lock
reviews.body: 3rd class service hei, Godrej ki, pls dont buy, product features bhaut ache hei, but build quality bilkul 0 hei, aaj 8 june 2026 ko almost 2 month ho gaye lock liye, but lock ka camera lock lagne k 2 din baad hi zor sei gate band hone par hi gir padda, and wo aaj tak camera ka part na to chnage kiya na hi fix kiya usko, aap agr NCR mei rehte hei to pls bilkul bhi buy mat karna, Service bhaut kharab hei, 15 eamils godrej ko kiye, every time ticket genrate k alwa kuch nahi. no response.
